top.title: 'Be serious... don't speak every day': Macron criticises Trump approach to Iran war
top.summary: The comments were an apparent jab at the US leader's sometimes contradictory stance on the US-Israeli war against Iran.

top.title: Iran's two largest steel plants shut down due to strikes, companies say
top.summary: The strikes, which Iran says were first launched by Israel in co-ordination with the US last week, could cause major damage to the Iranian economy.

top.title: Brazil grants joint custody over pets in new law for separated couples
top.summary: Lawmakers in the Brazilian Congress view the law change as a reflection of pets' importance for their owners.

top.title: Fewer UK adults posting on social media, Ofcom finds
top.summary: Some experts believe it highlights a social media shift as platforms boost short video.

top.title: Elon Musk's SpaceX set to be worth $1 trillion with planned public listing
top.summary: The company’s public stock debut is set to be one of the most valuable in history, and could make Musk the world's first trillionaire.

top.title: Peppa Pig and Transformers owner Hasbro hit by cyber-attack
top.summary: The firm says its operations remain open but says the hack "may result in some delays".
